videos.headline: Wake Forest opens game with 98-yard KO-return TD
videos.description: Chris Barnes returns the opening kickoff for a 98-yard touchdown and a 7-0 lead for Wake Forest.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Wake Forest opens game with 98-yard KO-return TD) 2025// ESHEET

videos.headline: Demond Claiborne walks it in for Wake Forest TD
videos.description: Demond Claiborne extends Wake Forest's lead 14-0 with a 1-yard touchdown rush.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Demond Claiborne walks it in for Wake Forest TD) 2025/09/12 ESHEET

videos.headline: NC State gets on the board after 4th-down gamble pays off
videos.description: CJ Bailey tosses a short touchdown pass to Justin Joly as NC State cuts into Wake Forest's lead.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (NC State gets on the board after 4th-down gamble pays off) 2025/09/11 ESHEET

videos.headline: Isaiah Shirley ties the score with a pick-six for NC State
videos.description: Isaiah Shirley returns an interception 41 yards for an NC State touchdown.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Isaiah Shirley ties the score with a pick-six for NC State) 2025/09/11 ESHEET

videos.headline: Robby Ashford puts Wake Forest back on top
videos.description: Robby Ashford keeps it and leaps into the end zone in celebration after putting Wake Forest up.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Robby Ashford puts Wake Forest back on top) 2025/09/11 ESHEET
NCF_One-Play (Connor Calvert makes 28-yard field goal) 2025/09/11 ESHEET
NCF_One-Play (Kanoah Vinesett kicks 24-yard field goal) 2025/09/11 ESHEET

videos.headline: NC State ties it with a 4-yard score
videos.description: CJ Bailey connects with Justin Joly on a 4-yard touchdown pass to even the score at 24-24.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (NC State ties it with a 4-yard score) 2025/09/11 ESHEET

videos.headline: CJ Bailey's 3rd TD pass puts NC State up
videos.description: CJ Bailey finds Keenan Jackson for a 12-yard touchdown to put NC State up 31-24.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (CJ Bailey's 3rd TD pass puts NC State up) 2025/09/11 ESHEET
NCF_One-Play (Kanoah Vinesett makes 37-yard field goal) 2025/09/11 ESHEET

videos.headline: Ronnie Royal III takes it away from Wake Forest with an INT
videos.description: Ronnie Royal III intercepts a pass to secure possession for NC State.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Ronnie Royal III takes it away from Wake Forest with an INT) 2025/09/11 ESHEET
